UserStory: As a developer, I want a runnable MEAN project scaffold so that the team can start feature work quickly
AcceptanceCriteria: Client and server apps start locally; environment variables are documented

UserStory: As a user, I want to register an account so that I can access protected features
AcceptanceCriteria: Register API validates input; unique email is enforced; JWT token is returned

UserStory: As a user, I want to log in securely so that I can continue with my role-based workflow
AcceptanceCriteria: Valid credentials return token and profile; invalid credentials return 401

UserStory: As a user, I want forgot/reset password support so that I can recover account access
AcceptanceCriteria: Forgot password generates reset token; reset password updates hash and logs in user

UserStory: As a user, I want login and registration screens so that I can create and access my account
AcceptanceCriteria: Login, register, forgot, and reset pages submit correctly and show errors

UserStory: As a system, I want session guard and token injection so that protected APIs stay secure
AcceptanceCriteria: Protected routes redirect to /login when token is missing; auth header is attached for API calls

UserStory: As a signed-in user, I want a home page so that I can view basic account status
AcceptanceCriteria: Home route is protected; signed-in user details are rendered

UserStory: As a tester, I want seeded demo accounts so that authentication flows can be validated quickly
AcceptanceCriteria: Seed script creates or updates demo farmer and buyer accounts with known credentials

UserStory: As a QA member, I want Sprint 1 test coverage so that auth regressions are caught early
AcceptanceCriteria: Core auth and routing test cases are documented and executable
